invariants.description: equity equals simulated-bankroll plus realised-pnl plus unrealised-pnl at all times
market-price is always in the closed interval [0, 1]
A strategy with state = on must have strategy-assigned-capital > 0 at the moment of toggle-on
Every paper-fill references a market that exists in the markets table and a strategy-id (or 'manual')
invariants.expression: paper_fill.market_id in markets AND paper_fill.source in (strategy_ids UNION {'manual'})

invariants.description: A paper-position closes when its net quantity returns to zero; its realised-pnl becomes fixed at that moment
invariants.expression: sum(fills_for_position.signed_quantity) == 0 => position.status = closed AND position.realised_pnl is final

invariants.description: Backtest results computed from stored-price-history only; never call live adapter endpoints during a backtest run
invariants.expression: backtest.execute() reads from stored_price_history; backtest.execute() does not invoke adapter.stream_live_prices

invariants.description: No system code path writes to a platform's real-money trading endpoint
invariants.expression: adapter exposes only READ methods; no method submits a real order

invariants.description: Sum of strategy-assigned-capital across all on-state strategies must not exceed equity
invariants.expression: sum(s.assigned_capital for s in strategies where s.state == 'on') <= equity

invariants.description: paper-fill.entry-price reflects the slippage-model output, not the raw market-price at the moment of the order
brier-score is only defined for strategies whose decide() method emits a probability forecast; market-maker is excluded

forbidden_states.description: A strategy with state = on but strategy-assigned-capital = 0
A backtest that completes with null results fields
forbidden_states.condition: backtest.status == 'completed' AND (backtest.result.final_equity == null OR backtest.result.equity_curve == null)

forbidden_states.description: Equity dropping below zero — allowed in backtest (bankruptcy is a valid outcome) but forbidden to display negative equity silently; must be flagged as 'bankrupt'
A comparison-run referencing a backtest-id that no longer exists
forbidden_states.condition: comparison_run.source_type == 'backtest' AND comparison_run.source_id NOT IN backtests

forbidden_states.description: An adapter reporting status = healthy while last-sync is older than 10× its configured poll interval
A paper-fill with source pointing to a strategy-id whose state is off
forbidden_states.condition: paper_fill.source in strategy_ids AND strategy[paper_fill.source].state == 'off' AND paper_fill.timestamp > last_off_toggle_ts

persistence_rules.description: paper-fill insertion and paper-position update must be atomic in a single transaction
Strategy state transitions (on/off) are logged with timestamp and previous state
Equity snapshots are persisted at least once per minute while any strategy has state = on, for the equity curve chart
Ingest-markets calls are idempotent on (platform, platform-market-id)
Deleting a strategy cascades to its associated backtest configurations but not to completed backtest results (history preserved)
Price ticks older than 3 years may be aggregated to daily OHLC to manage database size; raw ticks preserved for ≤3 years
All writes to paper-fill, paper-position, equity, strategy use a single writer (the FastAPI process) to avoid SQLite write contention

security_rules.description: The application binds to 127.0.0.1 only; no external network interface serves the UI
Adapter API keys (if supplied) are stored in a local .env file, never committed to the repo, never sent to the client
Adapter calls respect each platform's published rate limits; the system applies token-bucket throttling
All simulated-bankroll, equity, and pnl values are owned by the single local person; there is no multi-tenant boundary to enforce

hidden_state.description: Per-strategy running position inventory used by market-maker to manage adverse selection, not directly visible
Last-tick timestamp per market, drives the 'live' indicator on dashboard and informs slippage-model freshness
Token-bucket state per adapter, not user-facing but determines whether a sync-now request is executed immediately or queued
Computed equity curve cache — recomputed lazily from paper-fill history, invalidated on new fills
Strategy state transition log — used for accurate attribution in paper-trades filter

cross_screen_conditions.description: Toggling a strategy on (strategies) within one poll interval must cause new rows to appear on paper-trades and update the active-strategies panel on dashboard
cross_screen_conditions.effect: dashboard.active-strategies-panel shows the strategy with 'on' pill; dashboard.recent-trades-panel begins showing new paper-fills sourced from the strategy

cross_screen_conditions.description: Submitting a paper trade on market-detail updates paper-trades ledger and dashboard recent-trades
cross_screen_conditions.effect: paper-trades ledger shows new row with source='manual'; dashboard recent-trades panel shows new row; portfolio equity and equity-curve update

cross_screen_conditions.description: A closed paper-position updates portfolio.pnl-attribution-bars, dashboard tiles, and strategies.running-pnl of its source strategy
cross_screen_conditions.effect: portfolio all-time-pnl and attribution bars update; dashboard brier/sharpe/win-rate tiles recompute; strategies card running-pnl updates

cross_screen_conditions.description: Saving a backtest as a comparison-run makes it appear on compare
cross_screen_conditions.effect: compare.overlay-pnl-chart adds a new color-coded series; compare.comparison-table appends a new row

cross_screen_conditions.description: A failed adapter sync surfaces on data-ingestion status-pill and should decrement dashboard's adapter-health indicator
cross_screen_conditions.effect: data-ingestion status-pill changes color; dashboard platform-health indicator reflects the degraded state

cross_screen_conditions.description: Equity going negative (bankruptcy) while backtest is running should display 'BANKRUPT' on backtest results and halt further replay
cross_screen_conditions.effect: backtest.results-panel shows bankrupt flag; equity-curve terminates; subsequent ticks are not processed

cross_screen_conditions.description: Toggling a strategy off on the strategies screen stops new paper-fills from that source and updates attribution immediately
cross_screen_conditions.effect: no new paper-fills with source=strategy-id after off timestamp; dashboard.active-strategies-panel shows 'off' pill; portfolio.pnl-attribution for that strategy stops growing
